Home › Wayne, PA

Concierge Doctor in Wayne, PA

About Wayne, PA

Wayne, Pennsylvania is a vibrant Philadelphia Main Line community known for its walkable downtown, excellent schools, and family-friendly neighborhoods. Many residents choose personalized primary care that prioritizes prevention, longer visits, and strong doctor–patient relationships — which is the focus of Forward Family Medicine.

Wayne residents have long valued quality and personalization in their community’s services — and healthcare is no exception. The demand for a physician who has time, is accessible, and genuinely knows their patients is exactly why the concierge medicine model resonates here.

Concierge-Style Care at an Accessible Price

Forward Family Medicine delivers the core benefits of concierge medicine — direct physician access, same-day availability, unhurried visits, and proactive prevention — through the Direct Primary Care (DPC) model. That means no high annual retainer. One flat monthly membership fee, no insurance billing for primary care, and care that feels like having a doctor in the family.

How DPC and concierge medicine compare →

Why Wayne Patients Choose a Concierge-Style DPC Practice

  • You reach Dr. [Name] directly — not a call center
  • Same-day appointments for acute concerns
  • 30–60 minute visits when your situation calls for it
  • Proactive follow-up — we reach out, not just the other way around
  • Whole-person, prevention-first approach including lifestyle medicine
  • One predictable monthly fee — no copays, no billing surprises
  • A physician who knows your history without you having to re-explain it

Services Included in Membership

  • Unlimited in-person, phone, and video visits
  • Annual physicals and preventive screenings
  • Chronic disease management and medication management
  • Acute illness and injury care
  • Women’s health and men’s health
  • Lifestyle medicine counseling
  • Minor in-office procedures
  • Care coordination and specialist referrals

See all services →

Practical Information

Location: Wayne, PA — at the center of the Main Line Parking: [Details placeholder] Telehealth: All visits can be conducted by phone or video when appropriate. Great for follow-ups, prescription questions, or minor acute concerns. Hours: [Hours placeholder]

Wayne Member Experiences

“I’ve used concierge services in other cities and this is the first time I’ve found that level of care at a price that actually makes sense for my family.” — Member, Wayne PA (placeholder)

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Forward Family Medicine a true concierge practice in Wayne? We deliver the same-day access, direct physician contact, longer visits, and proactive prevention that define concierge medicine — through the DPC model, which keeps fees accessible. We consider ourselves concierge in experience, DPC in structure. More →

How is this different from large health system doctors in the Wayne area? Large health system practices typically operate on high-volume schedules with centralized scheduling and limited direct physician access. Forward Family Medicine is intentionally small — your physician knows you and is accessible to you directly.

What does concierge care cost in Wayne, PA? Our DPC membership starts at $[X]/month for individual adults — far less than traditional concierge retainer models. See pricing →

Can I schedule a visit before committing? Yes — our free Meet & Greet is exactly for that. Schedule here →

© 2026 Forward Family Medicine. All rights reserved.

Forward Family Medicine is a Direct Primary Care practice. Membership is not insurance. We recommend pairing DPC with a high-deductible or health-sharing plan.
